GetExecution.name: GetExecution
GetExecution.description: Grants permission to get details about specific execution within AWS Diagnostic tools

GetExecutionOutput.name: GetExecutionOutput
GetExecutionOutput.description: Grants permission to get details about specific execution output within AWS Diagnostic tools

GetTool.name: GetTool
GetTool.description: Grants permission to get details about specific tool within AWS Diagnostic tools

ListExecutions.name: ListExecutions
ListExecutions.description: Grants permission to list all available execution within AWS Diagnostic tools

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for an AWS Diagnostic tools resource

ListTools.name: ListTools
ListTools.description: Grants permission to list all available tools within AWS Diagnostic tools

StartExecution.name: StartExecution
StartExecution.description: Grants permission to start an execution workflow of specific tool within AWS Diagnostic tools

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag an AWS Diagnostic tools resource

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag an AWS Diagnostic tools resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag-value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of mandatory tags in the request
